## Content Contribution

### Content Metadata

- **Content Type:** <!-- lesson / activity / project / field-plan / recipe / experiment / adventure / practice / discussion / service -->
- **Stage:** <!-- genesis / foundation / explorer / builder / apprentice / architect -->
- **Pillar:** <!-- agency-critical-thinking / american-dynamism / physical-survival / building-engineering / software-ai / food-farming / core-academics / character-purpose -->
- **Safety Level:** <!-- green / yellow / red -->

### Checklist

- [ ] Used the correct template from `/templates/`
- [ ] All required YAML frontmatter fields are filled in
- [ ] File is named `{content-type}-{slug}.md`
- [ ] File is placed in `curriculum/{stage}/{pillar}/`
- [ ] Filename content-type matches frontmatter `content-type`
- [ ] Directory path matches frontmatter `stage` and `pillar`
- [ ] Learning objectives are specific and measurable
- [ ] Readiness indicators describe observable behaviors
- [ ] Safety considerations are documented (if safety-level is yellow or red)
- [ ] Materials list is complete and accessible
- [ ] Content has been proofread for clarity and accuracy

### Field Testing

- [ ] I have tested this content with children in the target age range
- [ ] I have not tested this but believe it is ready for field testing
